Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By an unexpected miracle, the[n]world was saved from the Fall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Peace was restored, and people[n]resumed their busy lives.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No one remembered anything about[n]the extraordinary turn of events.[n]{f 1 1}
